# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: example-namespace
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---

apiVersion: networking.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: example-server
  namespace: example-namespace
spec:
  identity:
    trustDomain: cluster.local
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP

---

apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-service
  namespace: example-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: example-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "default/example-service-account.cluster.local"
